title: Release Notes Generation Flow
activities: Initialize params (from, to, date) and git client
Fetch git log from params.from tag via simpleGit().log()
Build retro_prefixes lookup map from retro_prefixes_0 (hash → type prefix)
YES → Override commit.message with mapped string
YES → Prepend retro prefix to commit.message
Apply each transformer in complicated_cases array sequentially:
fix_i18n: if scope=='i18n' → set type='i18n', scope=undefined
deps_scope: if scope=='deps' → set type='chore', scope=undefined
doc_scopes: if scope in ['readme'] → set type='doc', scope=undefined
[Loop] Resolve scope aliases (while scope in scope_aliases → replace)
[Decision] scope not in known scopes registry?
Call ensure_scope(scope) → initialize data[scope] with empty arrays per type if absent
YES → Push { meta, commit } into data[scope][meta.type]
NO  → Discard commit (not added to output)
For each type in types (feat, i18n, fix):

parse_conventional_commit.signature: parse_conventional_commit(message: string) → { type, scope, summary } | null
parse_conventional_commit.logic: Matches regex /^([a-z0-9]+)(\([a-z0-9]+\))?:\s(.*)/, strips parens from scope, returns structured object or null

ensure_scope.logic: If data[name] doesn't exist, creates entry with empty arrays for each type key (feat, i18n, fix)

complicated_cases transformers: fix_i18n({ commit, meta }): scope 'i18n' → promote to type 'i18n', clear scope
deps_scope({ commit, meta }): scope 'deps' → type 'chore', clear scope
puterai_is_ai({ commit, meta }): normalize AI scope variants to 'ai'
doc_scopes({ commit, meta }): scope 'readme' → type 'doc', clear scope

data_structures.scopes: Map of scope key → { label } or { ignore: true } (e.g. 'tools' is ignored)
data_structures.scope_aliases: { main→puter, ui→gui, parsely→phoenix } — resolved via while-loop
data_structures.retro_prefixes: Flat hash→prefix map built from retro_prefixes_0 (handles non-conventional commits)
data_structures.message_changes: Hash→message map for complete message overrides

decision_points: commit.hash in message_changes → full message override
commit.hash in retro_prefixes → prepend type prefix
scope in scope_aliases → resolve alias (while loop, multi-hop possible)
meta.type not in types → commit excluded from output
output_format: Markdown: version header, then sections per scope (H3) and type (H4), each commit as '- {summary} ([shorthash](url))'
important_notes: Script uses top-level await (ESM). Commit classification is purely message-driven. 'chore' and 'doc' types are parsed but silently dropped (not in types map). The 'tools' scope is ignored via ignore flag. Scope alias resolution is a while loop (handles chained aliases). REPO_URL is hardcoded to HeyPuter/puter on GitHub.
